task.name: Update BMAD Config
task.description: Update BMAD module config to use RBTV project-specific output folder before invoking BMAD workflows
task.objective: Update a BMAD module's config.yaml file (e.g., bmm/config.yaml) to redirect output_folder, planning_artifacts, and implementation_artifacts to an RBTV project-specific path, enabling BMAD workflows to write outputs to the correct RBTV project folder instead of the default BMAD root output folder.

llm.rule: Read the complete task before starting execution.
ALWAYS back up original config values before modification.
NEVER modify config without explicit confirmation from invoking workflow or user.
Validate paths exist before writing config — create directories if needed.

inputs.input: BMAD module whose config to update (e.g., "bmm", "cis", "core"). Defaults to "bmm".
Full RBTV output folder path for this project/milestone (e.g., "{bmad_output}/{project-name}/business-innovation/m4-prototypation").

Optional. When provided, sets planning_artifacts independently from output_folder. Use when BMAD should READ from one location (e.g., M1 conception folder) and WRITE to another (e.g., bmad-analysis subfolder). When omitted, planning_artifacts is set to rbtv_output_folder (current default behavior).

substep.title: Check Required Inputs
substep.action: Verify that project_name and rbtv_output_folder are provided.

check.action: HALT: Report missing inputs and exit. Cannot proceed without project_name and rbtv_output_folder.

substep.title: Resolve Target Config Path
substep.action: Set target_module to "bmm" if not provided.
Resolve config path: {project-root}/_bmad/{target_module}/config.yaml
Verify the config file exists at this path.

check.action: HALT: Report that config file does not exist at resolved path. List available modules.

substep.title: Read Current Config
substep.action: Read the complete config.yaml file from target path.
Extract current values for: output_folder, planning_artifacts, implementation_artifacts.

substep.title: Store Backup
substep.action: Store original values in a session variable or temporary note for potential restore.
Log backup: "Original config backed up: output_folder={value}, planning_artifacts={value}, implementation_artifacts={value}".

substep.title: Prepare New Values
substep.action: Set output_folder and implementation_artifacts to rbtv_output_folder:
- output_folder: {rbtv_output_folder}
- implementation_artifacts: {rbtv_output_folder}
Set planning_artifacts based on whether rbtv_planning_artifacts was provided:
- If rbtv_planning_artifacts is provided: planning_artifacts: {rbtv_planning_artifacts}
- If rbtv_planning_artifacts is NOT provided: planning_artifacts: {rbtv_output_folder} (default behavior)

substep.title: Ensure Target Directory Exists
substep.action: Check if the directory at rbtv_output_folder exists.

check.action: Create the directory using mkdir command with -p flag (create parents if needed).
Confirm creation: "Created RBTV output folder at {rbtv_output_folder}".

substep.title: Write Updated Config
substep.action: Replace the three values in config.yaml with new values.
Preserve all other config values and formatting.
Write updated config back to {project-root}/_bmad/{target_module}/config.yaml

substep.title: Verify Write
substep.action: Read the updated config.yaml to verify changes were applied.
Confirm all three values now point to rbtv_output_folder.

substep.title: Report Success
substep.action: Output confirmation message:
"✅ BMAD {target_module} config updated for RBTV project '{project_name}'"
" Output folder: {rbtv_output_folder}"
" BMAD workflows will now write to this RBTV project folder."
" (Original values backed up for restore)"

halt-conditions.condition: Required inputs (project_name, rbtv_output_folder) not provided — report and exit.
Target config file does not exist — report path and available modules, then exit.
Directory creation fails — report error and exit without modifying config.

task.restore-note: To restore original BMAD config values after RBTV workflow completion, use the companion task: restore-bmad-config.xml with the same target_module. Original values are logged in this task's output for manual restore if needed.
